title: Projektmanager (w/m/d)
required_skills: Abgeschlossenes Studium Wirtschaftswissenschaften / Wirtschaftsinformatik oder vergleichbar
matched_skills: IT/digitalization project coordination — HSBC USD 8M digital transformation PMO
C-level reporting & communication of complex topics
Technology operations & tech stack lifecycle management
missing_skills: Explicit Jira / Confluence proficiency (not stated in CV — likely used but not named)
Anforderungsmanagement / requirements documentation as primary role focus
key_requirements: Steer IT and digitalization projects end-to-end (idea to go-live)
Translate business requirements into clear, actionable specifications for IT
Accompany IT development cycles, test new features, validate portal quality
Act as central liaison between business units and development team
Identify project risks and blockers early; propose pragmatic solutions
cv_highlights: PMO at HSBC: managed 6 workstreams across a USD 8M digital transformation, coordinated stakeholders, escalated risks to C-suite — directly mirrors the IT project bridging role
Project Coordination at Hapag-Lloyd: ran Agile sprint ceremonies (planning, retros, reviews), KPI reporting, cross-functional coordination between project teams, product owners, and stakeholders
Technology operations background: tech stack lifecycle management and vendor management align with the IT-facing responsibilities
Fluent German (business) and English — satisfies the 'sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse' requirement
Power BI Certified — demonstrates structured data and reporting mindset relevant to transparent project communication
gaps: Jira and Confluence not explicitly named in CV — should be added if used at Hapag-Lloyd or HSBC
Requirements management (Anforderungsmanagement) is a core duty here but not a labeled skill in CV — needs to be surfaced through HSBC/Hapag-Lloyd descriptions
No explicit portal or feature testing experience mentioned
Academic background not stated in the CV summary — if Wirtschaftsinformatik or related, should be stated clearly
recommended_emphasis: Lead with HSBC PMO experience as proof of end-to-end IT project ownership and stakeholder bridging
Explicitly name Jira and Confluence in skills or experience sections if used
Reframe cross-functional coordination as 'Anforderungsmanagement' — highlight gathering, structuring, and communicating business requirements to IT
Highlight Agile ceremonies at Hapag-Lloyd (sprint planning, retrospectives) as evidence of modern project methodology
Mention any experience with testing, UAT, or feature validation — even informally — to close the portal QA gap
Use CV phrasing that mirrors JD language: 'liaison between business unit and IT', 'elicit and document requirements'
recommendation: Good fit — apply with targeted CV. The HSBC digital transformation PMO and Hapag-Lloyd Agile coordination experience map directly to the core duties. The main gaps are cosmetic: Jira/Confluence must be named explicitly in the CV, and requirements management should be surfaced as a labeled competency. Hannover is ~60km from Lüneburg — commutable or worth relocating. Recommend applying.
